title: @DataChaz: 🚨 Yarchi just published an awesome guide on building an AI "second brain" using Claude and Obsidian Based on @karpathy'
summary: @DataChaz: 🚨 Yarchi just published an awesome guide on building an AI "second brain" using Claude and Obsidian Based on @karpathy'
whyItMatters: 🚨 Yarchi just published an awesome guide on building an AI "second brain" using Claude and Obsidian Based on @karpathy's LLM Wiki concept, the idea is to stop starting from a blank chat window and start building a compounding knowledge graph. Obsidian handles the local storage. Claude acts as the brain. I wrote down the condensed notes on how to wire them…
